evals.prompt: Review this React component for accessibility: a card with onClick that uses divs for everything, no alt text on images, and hardcoded colors
assertions: identifies div-as-button antipattern and suggests semantic HTML
flags missing alt text on images
flags hardcoded colors as design system violation
organizes findings by severity (critical, important, suggestion)

evals.prompt: Do a performance review of a page that has 50 inline useEffect hooks, no code splitting, and 2MB unoptimized images
assertions: identifies excessive useEffect usage and suggests alternatives
flags unoptimized images and suggests WebP/AVIF with responsive srcset

evals.prompt: Review this CSS file that uses !important throughout, has 5-level deep selectors, and hardcoded px values
assertions: identifies deep selectors as maintainability risk
recommends design tokens for hardcoded values
suggests flat selectors or CSS Modules for scoping
